compiled_state.title: Cleanup: design-wireframe launches chromium without guaranteed browser.close() in generated script
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The design-wireframe skill (SKILL.md lines 488-500) writes a temporary Playwright script to /tmp/design-capture-*.mjs that launches chromium in headless mode via the Playwright Node API. The script template does not enforce browser.close() in a try/finally block. If the node process errors, the Chrome subprocess is orphaned. Even on success, cleanup depends on LLM-generated code that may omit browser.close(). Fix: provide a fixed template with try/finally { await browser.close() } wrapping the main logic.
